ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

resources.title: Cytosis (board game)
resources.author: Genius Games
resources.rationale: Ever wondered what happens inside your cells? **Cytosis** takes you on an epic journey through the inner workings of a human cell. Play as a scientist managing organelles, collecting resources, and building enzymes, hormones, and cell components — all while learning real biology!
